items.title: Duer’s Wear-Everywhere Pants Are on Sale This Weekend
items.summary: It’s not often you can score discounts from the outdoor-coded Canadian company that makes understated and stylish performance clothing.

items.title: Apple is reportedly looking to buy chips from a US-blacklisted Chinese company
items.summary: Apple is seeking clearance from the Trump administration to buy chips from a company linked to the Chinese military, according to Financial Times.
